title: Positive Flow: Navigating to Reviews Page
test_steps: Open the Food Delivery App. | Navigate to the 'Biancorosso' restaurant page. | Click on the 'REVIEWS' tab.
expected_result: The 'REVIEWS' tab should be selected. | The content area should display the message 'No reviews' and 'There are no reviews found for this restaurant.'

title: Negative Flow: No Internet Connection
test_steps: Open the Food Delivery App. | Navigate to the 'Biancorosso' restaurant page. | Simulate no internet connection. | Click on the 'REVIEWS' tab.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating no internet connection.

title: Boundary/Validation: Minimum Order Amount
test_steps: Open the Food Delivery App. | Navigate to the 'Biancorosso' restaurant page. | Verify the minimum order amount displayed is AED 49.00.
expected_result: The minimum order amount should be displayed as AED 49.00.

title: UI Test: Header Navigation
test_steps: Open the Food Delivery App. | Navigate to the 'Biancorosso' restaurant page. | Click on the back arrow in the Header/App Bar. | Click on the shopping cart icon in the Header/App Bar.
expected_result: The app should navigate back to the previous screen. | The app should navigate to the shopping cart screen.

title: Accessibility Test: Screen Reader
test_steps: Open the Food Delivery App. | Navigate to the 'Biancorosso' restaurant page. | Use a screen reader to navigate through the screen.
expected_result: The screen reader should read out the content correctly.

title: Usability Test: Navigation
test_steps: Open the Food Delivery App. | Navigate to the 'Biancorosso' restaurant page. | Click on the 'REVIEWS' tab. | Click on the back arrow in the Header/App Bar. | Click on the shopping cart icon in the Header/App Bar.
expected_result: The navigation should be smooth and intuitive.

title: Regression Test: No Reviews
test_steps: Open the Food Delivery App. | Navigate to the 'Biancorosso' restaurant page. | Click on the 'REVIEWS' tab.
expected_result: The content area should display the message 'No reviews' and 'There are no reviews found for this restaurant.'

title: Data Persistence Test: Minimum Order Amount
test_steps: Open the Food Delivery App. | Navigate to the 'Biancorosso' restaurant page. | Verify the minimum order amount displayed is AED 49.00.
expected_result: The minimum order amount should be displayed as AED 49.00.
